<compiler>/tests/fixtures/unsupported-http-method/input.js:5:1: SLOPPYC_E_UNSUPPORTED_HTTP_METHOD: only app.mapGet(...) route extraction is supported
  --> <compiler>/tests/fixtures/unsupported-http-method/input.js:5:1
   |
5 | app.mapPost("/", () => Results.text("Hello"));
   | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
hint: Non-GET methods are deferred from the compiler extraction MVP.
